But life eventually begins to imitate art.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Lizzo Earns Her Hot Sauce Crown While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Lizzo is a three-time Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter, and it's likely she'll be adding a few more of those trophies to the mantle with her latest album, "Special."

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Elizabeth Olsen is an actress from "Wind River," "Ingrid Goes West" and the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Comedy duo Rhett and Link are among the most requested "Hot Ones" guests of all time!

programme.sub-title: Steve-O Tells Insane Stories While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "Jackass" star Steve-O battles the likes of Dirty Dick's and Blair's Mega Death Sauce with Sean Evans on this highly anticipated episode.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shawn Mendes Reveals a New Side of Himself While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the 19-year-old pop phenom reps his Canadian roots while taking on the wings of death. Along the scorched road, Mendes addresses everything from Justin Bieber's hockey skills to guitar store etiquette.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Abbi and Ilana of "Broad City" Go Numb While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Abbi Jacobson and Ilana Glazer are the creators and stars of "Broad City," the beloved TV comedy show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Chance the Rapper Battles Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Chicago native battles the wings of death and discusses everything from Kanye West's latest evolution to the relationship between rap and the Chicago White Sox. Will he finally ditch his independent roots and sign to the "Hot Ones" label?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Lil Nas X Celebrates Thanksgiving With the Biggest Last Dab Ever
programme.desc: Find out how the diamond-certified rapper fares in this hot sauce rodeo while answering questions about making panini with Gordon Ramsay, performing a duet with Elmo, the cowboy lifestyle, performing at his old school and, of course, Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: A$AP Ferg Harlem Shakes While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Harlem rapper, designer and all-around Renaissance man A$AP Ferg just dropped his new album. Watch as the A$AP Mob emcee takes on some hot questions and even hotter wings!

programme.title: Growing Up Smith
programme.desc: In 1979, an Indian family moves to America with hopes of living the American Dream. While their 10-year-old boy Smith falls head-over-heels for the girl next door, his desire to become a "good old boy" propels him further away from his family's ideals than ever before.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon plans to take Tracey and Dorien on a wild weekend, but Tracey is about to receive big news.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey awaits her scan results, she and Sharon talk truths, and Dorien prepares her goodbyes.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: As their kids start to define who they are in the world, Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) must navigate how their own pasts shape what they pass down to their children.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: When their son's best friend moves away, Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) must confront the influence the outside world has in shaping who their kids are growing into.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: A young man desperate to change his life makes a deal with the Devil.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: An extremely ordinary man discovers that his ex, who he dumped, is a powerful superhero.

programme.title: Guy Dates Four Girls At Once
programme.desc: After discovering her boyfriend's betrayal, Cassidy seeks revenge by manipulating multiple guys. Her plan backfires publicly, leading to humiliation and the loss of the one genuine connection. Ultimately, she seeks redemption, learning that honesty and vulnerability lead to true happiness.

programme.title: Boyfriend Framed For Cheating
programme.desc: Amy worries her long-distance boyfriend, David, will cheat in college. Tara, a jealous classmate, tries to sabotage their relationship with misleading photos. However, Amy and David's trust prevails when a "live photo" reveals the truth, leading to Amy's college acceptance and their enduring love.

programme.title: Girl Denies Nerd In Front Of School
programme.desc: Arrogant Raji snubs Mario, her secret admirer, for popular Davis. After a disastrous Valentine's date exposes Davis's true colors and leaves her with a huge bill, Raji learns humility and accepts Mario's kindness.

programme.title: Billionaire Falls In Love With Poor Boy
programme.desc: A shallow rich girl, Gemma, fakes a relationship with nerdy Jordan to escape her controlling boyfriend. But when her lie is exposed, she realizes Jordan's genuine kindness and chooses love over money.

programme.title: Nice Guy With Broken Heart
programme.desc: After a breakup, Dallas becomes a player, juggling multiple dates. His schemes unravel when an exposé goes viral, costing him a second chance with his ex and leaving him single and humiliated.

programme.title: Teens Kicked Out Of Store By Mean Man
programme.desc: Shy, hungry orphan Joey, bullied by his foster mom, is saved by his compassionate teacher, Mrs. Stevens. She uncovers his abuse and uses his talents for good, leading to his rescue and a hopeful new beginning.

programme.title: Spoiled Girl Survives The Word'd Strictest School
programme.desc: Wealthy, spoiled Selena, grieving her mother, sabotages her father's engagement by making her life miserable at boarding school. She discovers her late mother's history there and, guided by the school's ethos, transforms her outlook, finding peace and genuine connection.

programme.title: Police Chief's Daughter Is Arrested
programme.desc: Arrested for shoplifting, Leah, the police chief's spoiled daughter, is sentenced to community service at the store she robbed. Forced to work, she learns the value of hard work, pays off debts, and earns her parents' genuine pride.

programme.title: Kid Steals Tickets At Fun Center
programme.desc: Teens Mikey and Jay cheat to win a video game convention pass at a birthday party. Their scheme is exposed, but not before their moms overhear, resulting in both boys being punished and learning a hard lesson.

programme.title: Kids Build Secret Gaming Room To Hide From Mom
programme.desc: Jay tricks his mom into taking a vacation so he can build a secret gaming room. His plan succeeds until his mom's early return exposes his lies, leading to a hilarious punishment that teaches him a valuable lesson in honesty.

programme.title: In-Laws Ruin Their Family Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Trapped by a blizzard, feuding moms Judy and Nana turn Thanksgiving into a war zone, nearly driving Jenna and Roger to divorce. Realizing they've gone too far, the matriarchs put aside their differences to cook a reconciliation feast and save the family.

programme.title: Parents & Kids Switch Lives For 24 Hours

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Scott Walker, one of the world's most experienced kidnap for ransom negotiators, reveals the tactics he uses whilst negotiating, recounts his most thrilling cases, and explains how he stays calm whilst bargaining with terrorists.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former armed robber Adam Muganzi describes having a £100k bounty placed on his head by a drug kingpin, experiencing night-time police raids, and how he turned his life around after spending 10 years in prison.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with Sebastian Junger, a renowned journalist and filmmaker who has spent over 20 years documenting life on the front lines in war zones. Sebastian shares stories from his career in Bosnia, Afghanistan, and Liberia, recounting the most shocking events he's witnessed and delving into the ethical dilemmas faced by war journalists. He also reflects on the profound impact of a near-death experience he had in 2020, offering insights into how it has reshaped his perspective on life and work.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Writer Michael Thexton is a survivor of the 1986 Pan Am Flight 73 hijacking which resulted in 22 deaths. In this episode, he walks us through the ordeal of being held hostage by terrorists, seeing his fellow passengers killed, and his narrow escape.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we hear from the remarkable Sosa Henkoma who survived being groomed by a South East London drugs gang as a child. To escape abuse at home, Sosa ran away and was first introduced to county lines drug dealing as an 11-year-old. He found himself at the centre of a war between two rival gangs, that led to him being shot, stabbed and ironed on the chest as a young teenager. After years of brutal gang violence, Sosa finally received support as a survivor of child trafficking and grooming. He now uses his voice to help young people and educate law enforcement on preventing grooming and child exploitation.

programme.title: The Eleven
programme.desc: Arsenal fan Turkish and Man City supporter Big Steve debate who makes it into a team of Mikel Arteta's Gunners and Pep Guardiola's defending Premier League and Champions League winners, with Chelsea fan Matisse as The Judge.

programme.title: The Eleven

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?: Episode 13

From Idris' hilariously cheeky original DJ name to the movie John can't let him live down.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest stars Chris Wood and Morgan Gibbs-White debate some of the biggest football debates. The striker and the midfielder discuss scoring a worldie long-range striker or a tap-in? And who would make the best manager?

programme.title: WOULD YOU RATHER?
programme.desc: The Wake Up Dead Man cast, Josh O'Connor, Mila Kunis, Kerry Washington and Andrew Scott, join us for a hilarious round of Would You Rather? Expect unhinged debates about mind-reading vs invisibility, 100 duck-sized horses, and ketchup tears.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this episode of LADbible's Agree to Disagree, F1 movie stars Brad Pitt and Damson Idris go head-to-head over some of the internet's biggest debates… and things get surprisingly heated on the topic of 90s vs modern fashion and even hot dogs!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Find out if Ewan McGregor and Hayden Christensen think the Star Wars prequels were underrated, if they believe Darth Vader is the best villain in movie history and if they think the Star Wars universe and their fanbase are the best.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Paul Mescal and Andrew Scott settle some age-old debates about whether bowling is embarrassing, what the best form of potato is, and share their very strong opinions on the immediate banning of karaoke and personalised number plates.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: House of the Dragon stars Matt Smith and Paddy Considine play a funny game of Snack Wars! This time he has a hilarious reaction to eating haggis, shares his thoughts on McDonald's and we even see try his first ever gin shot!

programme.title: Swipe Stuff

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: The owner of a hairdressing salon races to his shop hoping to catch thieves in the act, a burglar is spotted climbing into a bathroom window by an eagle-eyed neighbour, and a man makes a schoolboy error trying to steal from a radio station.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: An intruder raids a social club's safe while the manager is on the phone, a burglar tries to rob a house but meets his match at the foot of the stairs, and a man breaks into a garage and ends up bathing in engine oil.

programme.title: Rob & Romesh Vs...: Cricket: The Test
programme.desc: Cricket newbies Rob and Romesh continue to follow England's Test series in South Africa as the match comes to a dramatic finale.

programme.title: Brassic: Antique Dildo
programme.desc: After Vinnie discovers the car he has nicked contains antiques stolen from Terence McCann, he finds himself under orders to find the person responsible or face dismemberment.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E44
programme.desc: Larry Tate invites Samantha and Darrin to a buffet for prospective client Charles Barlow. When they complain about the condition of their clothes, Aunt Clara uses magic to produce a dress for Samantha and a new suit for Darrin, who invites her along to the affair. Once there, Aunt Clara removes a fire hydrant so Darrin can park. At the party, Samantha's dress begins to vanish and Aunt Clara's other magical efforts begin to disintegrate. Agreeing to drop Barlow at his hotel, Darrin finds the hydrant has returned to its place beside the car. As a policeman approaches, Darrin's outer garments disappear. Aunt Clara's efforts to help result in chaos, with Barlow, Darrin and the policeman dressed in each other's clothing. Barlow leaves, vowing Darrin will never get his account, and still in his underwear, Darrin is jailed with Montague, an alcoholic. After Aunt Clara's attempts to clothe Darrin fail, Samantha goes to his cell with a suit of clothes. When Judge Crosetti hears Montague's mad account of a change of clothing in the cell, he releases Darrin. Larry Tate, having heard Barlow's equally wild story, decides his company is not interested in handling his account.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E45
programme.desc: Dr. Passmore, psychiatrist at a rest home, tells Samantha his patients would like to do something to mark the Centennial of the End of the War Between the States. Samantha tells him Darrin will publicize the affair. Annoyed, Darrin tells Passmore Samantha will write a script for the pageant. Darrin criticizes Samantha's wooden characters. Taking Endora's advice, Samantha uses magic to bring her characters to life, so she can describe them. Soon Confederate Captain Corcoran, Violet, a beautiful Yankee, and an Indian, added for a neutral touch, are wandering around the Stephens' home. Seeing them, Gladys Kravitz flips. When Darrin arrives, the characters refuse to leave. How-ever, they vanish when Darrin kisses Samantha. Gladys tells her story to Passmore. He prescribes for her, but seeing the characters himself, decides he needs a vacation. When Samantha's writing comes to a halt, Corcoran, Violet and the Indian finish the script themselves and leave. After the pageant, Samantha is asked to create a vaudeville revue for the rest home. Two song and dance men appear. Gladys sees them and runs screaming into the night. Samantha tells Darrin she'll need lots of love to keep the hoofers away.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E46
programme.desc: Darrin is struggling to create an advertising campaign for a toy ship model manufactured by Mr. Herding. When Samantha wonders whether the Stephens ' baby will look like his father, Endora turns Darrin into an eight-year-old. Returned to normal, Darrin goes to his office. Samantha repeats a disparaging remark Darrin made about Endora. Piqued, Endora turns Darrin into a boy at his office. Mr. Harding sees Darrin and compli-ments Larry on hiring a child to devise a campaign for a toy. Samantha uses magic to return Darrin to normal size but is called on time after time to change him from man to boy when Harding insists on having a point meeting with Darrin and the boy. Finally, as a child, Darrin meets two boys who tell him the ship model is no good because it can't do anything. As Darrin, the man, persuades Harding and Larry to make the changes suggested by the two boys, Samantha gratefully produces a kite for each. When Darrin tells her he'd like to join them, Saman-tha replies he'll have his own son to play with soon.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E47
programme.desc: Aunt Clara tells Samantha and Endora she is hiding from warlock Hedley Partridge, because she fears her old beau will discover her magic no longer works. Seeing in Hedley a husband for Aunt Clara, who has become a problem, Endora invites him to the Stephens home. Samantha decides to make sure Aunt Clara's tricks work. Unaware of this, Aunt Clara is sure her gift is returned when she matches all of Hedley's tricks. When Samantha goes out of the room, Aunt Clara tries to follow Hedley's ro-mantic suggestion that they turn themselves into nightingales, but Hedley becomes an animal, while Aunt Clara's lower half disappears. Gladys Kravitz, who has become hysterical watching the strange happenings, drags Abner over to the Stephens house. When Samantha returns Aunt Clara and Hedley to normal, Aunt Clara is crushed to learn that Samantha helped her all along. Gladys skeptically accepts Abner's explanation that Hedley's magic was performed with the aid of wires. Aunt Clara and Hedley each admit that none of their tricks work as well as they used to. Promising to return, Hedley leaves. Aunt Clara tells Samantha his parting gift a rhinestone doorknob, is more precious than an engagement ring.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E48
programme.desc: Walter and Margaret Brocken ask Samantha to keep their son Merle, a ten year old warlock, while they attend a witches convention. When Merle agrees not to do any magic before Darrin, Samantha invites him to stay. Meanwhile, Larry Tate asks Darrin to keep an expensive necklace, a birthday present for. his wife, at the Stephens home. Darrin goes to Merle's room, where the young warlock has turned a hairbrush into a model fire engine, which flashes with electric shocks when Darrin touches it. Darrin shouts with pain until Merle turns off the current. Samantha is now forced to disclose that Merle is a warlock. Merle again promises Samantha to refrain from magic in the house. That night a burglar who had seen Larry giving Darrin the necklace breaks in and overpowers Darrin. Darrin calls on Merle for a magical assist, but Merle stands by his promise. When the burglar finds the necklace, Darrin cons him into taking the fire engine too. As he reaches for it, Merle turns on his magic. Later, Gladys is more bewildered than ever as she hears the burglar explaining to the police how he was captured by a toy fire engine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E57
programme.desc: Joe Kovack makes a play for Samantha in a restaurant. Darrin rushes to her defense. Realizing Darrin faces certain slaughter, Samantha twitches her nose and Joe falls to the floor, Since Joe is Number One contender for the heavyweight title, newspapers hail Darrin as a coming champ. Darrin pleads with Samantha to let him fight, his own battles. Then, Joe and his Manager, trying to regain a crack at a lucrative championship bout, approach Darrin with a plan for a make-believe bout in which Joe pretends to knock Darrin out. Again, Darrin with the uncalled-on help of Samantha K.O.'s Joe. Finally, Darrin runs into Tommy Carter, the champ-himself. An unplanned for scuffle takes place. Tommy trips and knocks himself out. Later, Larry Tate tells Darrin he has solved the problem by hiring Tommy. Tommy's first assignment is to fight a four-round bout for charity. Darrin quakes at learning that Tommy is to choose his opponent. However, he sadly concludes that with Samantha insisting on being his second, he can't help winning again.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E59
programme.desc: For his birthday, Endora decides to make three of Darrin's wishes come true. Unaware of the gift, Darrin gets immediate elevator service in his office building, and they see a bikini-clad beauty. An important client, Randolph Turgeon, insists on seeing Larry Tate, who is in Chicago. Wishing he were Larry for just one day, Darrin immediately turns into his boss. Turgeon introduces Darrin-Larry to his niece, Joyce, who wants a job with the agency. Louise Tate, who thinks her husband is with another woman, slaps her face, and makes him come home. Darrin phones Samantha for help. She arrives immediately, but is un-able to remove the spell. Just as Samantha is telling Darrin--Larry the spell will be over in fifteen minutes, Larry himself walks in. Hoping to keep the confusion from getting worse, Samantha puts Louise to sleep, and tells Larry his wife has been sleep-walking. Safe at home, Samantha tells Darrin Louise will feel she dreamed the whole episode. She asks Darrin what his first two wishes were. He mentions the elevator but decides to forget the girl in the bikini.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E60
programme.desc: Samantha tries unsuccessfully to make her own dress for an affair at the home of an agency client, J.T. Glendon. Whisking Samantha to Paris, Endora takes her to the showroom of Aubert, a couturier who has failed in his attempts to break into the American market. Back home, Samantha uses magic to duplicate an Aubert original. Doris, J.T,'s wife admires the dress. Suddenly. Samantha finds herself committed to making dresses for Doris, J.T.'s sister, Ethel, and Gladys Kravitz. Darrin reveals J.T.'s party is a preview of original creations by his new client, Aubert. Samantha is stunning but the other three women look awful in their creations. Aubert faints when he sees the women wearing his "originals." Later Darrin tells Samantha that Aubert, certain he has been doublecrossed, is suing the agency. Samantha convinces Aubert that he has failed in the American market because he hasn't created dresses for women like Doris and Gladys. With Aubert designing, Samantha finishes dresses for another show in which even Gladys is a standout.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E63
programme.desc: Darrin reacts violently when he finds Brian O'Brian, a sprightly leprechaun, a guest in his home. Samantha tells him that Brian is not her relative but the leprechaun of Darrin's family. Brian reveals he has come to recover his pot of gold which was hidden in a fireplace brought to America by James Dennis Robinson. Darrin finds that Robinson owns a company whose account would be a great asset to Darrin's agency. Brian breaks into Robinson's house to retrieve the gold and is arrested. Darrin allows Samantha to use her magic to get Brian out of jail. Brian pleads with Samantha to help him recover his pot of gold which will restore his lost powers. Pledging Brian never to tell Darrin, Samantha returns with him to the Robinson's house. Robinson finds them in his study and reveals he has already removed the pot from the fireplace. Samantha is sur-prised when Robinson tells her he believes the leprechaun's story because his grandfather was a Mahoney, and returns Brian's pot of gold. Brian agrees to allow Robinson to use his picture as a trade mark if Robinson turns his advertising over to Darrin.

programme.title: Bewitched S3E75
programme.desc: Dr. Koblin reports that Tabitha is a normal baby. But, Samantha sees a toy pony floating in the air to Tabitha when she wiggles her fingers, and realizes the baby has inherited her witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched S3E76
programme.desc: Samantha still hasn't found the courage to tell Darrin Tabitha is a witch.

programme.title: Bewitched S3E77
programme.sub-title: Witches & Warlocks Are My Favorite Things
programme.desc: Endora tells Samantha that her aunts are coming to the Stephens' home to test Tabitha's powers of witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E40
programme.desc: Phoning from London, the Tates inform the Stephens that their governess has been taken ill. They ask Darrin and Samantha to care for the child until they return. Gladys Kravitz sees them leaving the house and returning with a baby. Assuming the Stephens' baby has arrived, Gladys congratulates Maurice, Samantha's father, on the birth of his grandson. Maurice is shocked to find the baby is not being taught witchcraft. He flies away with the child to the Warlock's Club in London. Meanwhile, the Tates arrive at the local airport. Darrin tries to stall while Samantha finds their baby. In London, after many tests, the Warlocks tell Maurice the baby "hasn't got it." Nanny Witch adds that the baby is a mortal like the father. At the Stephens home, Samantha and Darrin are about to tell the Tates their baby is missing, when Maurice arrives with the child. Maurice's pride is restored when Samantha tells him her baby is not due for several months. Arriving with a present, Gladys is told to wait until Samantha's baby is born. Before vanishing through a wall, Maurice hands Gladys a martini. Watching Gladys down it, Samantha hopes she will not remember what she has seen and heard.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E7
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kim deal with a last-minute snag. Howard's investigation finally yields results.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E8
programme.desc: An unexpected visitor forces Jimmy and Kim to face the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E9
programme.desc: Gus attempts to smooth things over with the cartel while Mike ties up loose ends north of the border.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E10
programme.desc: A lost dog leads to a new friend. A new player gets in the game.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E11
programme.desc: Emboldened by recent successes, the partners escalate their enterprise to new levels.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E12
programme.desc: The stakes are raised when a discovery is made that will send shockwaves far and wide.

programme.title: Better Call Saul S6E5
programme.desc: While business booms for Jimmy, the vise tightens on the cat and mouse game between Gus and Lalo.

programme.title: Poldark

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Series premiere. Returning home following his arrest, Poldark prepares for his trial.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Demelza tries to influence Ross's case, but George has a number of tricks up his sleeve.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Period drama. Ross and Demelza face financial ruin, and George plots revenge on Jud.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Ross strikes a deal with a local smuggler, while Dwight tries to diagnose an epidemic.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: An informant in the smuggling ring poses a serious threat to all. George buys Ross's debt.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Ross tries to financially support Elizabeth. Dwight and Caroline meet in secret again.

programme.desc: The inmates of a German World War II prisoner of war camp conduct an espionage and sabotage campaign right under the noses of their warders.

programme.title: Rose And Maloney
programme.desc: Rose and Maloney find themselves in a murky world of corruption and racism.

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: Mo Murray is a single mother who refuses to close her salon in order to respect a recently deceased gang member

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: Stephen Cartwright is a 17-year-old driven mad and to attempt murder following the death of his mother.

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: Simon is a bored English teacher by day, and becomes Tracie, a transvestite, by night.

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: Tina Dhakin is a prison officer in charge of young offender inmates, including Stephen Cartwright.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: When Wolfgang West gets put away for 4 years, his wife decides it's time for her family to go straight.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Working for the Hong family, Van finds himself the object of Mrs Hong's affections.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: Lors d'une infiltration, l'intérêt de Chris pour un trafiquant de drogue éveille les soupçons de Dov. Duncan fait des accusations contre Andy, qui décide d'aider Sam dans une sombre affaire.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: Andy et Sam décident d'interroger une liste de détenus d'un pénitencier, tous associés au principal suspect du meurtre de Brian Gowdy. Mais l'un d'eux est Jay Swarek, le père de Sam.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prépare Andy à se défendre lors de l'audience de licenciement de Duncan, mais ce dernier avançant de nouvelles preuves, Oliver va compromettre son intégrité et son amitié avec Andy.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Le problème de dépendance de Chris atteint son paroxysme durant une enquête sur un cambriolage suspect qui révèlera un problème de famille dysfonctionnelle et qui les mettra en danger.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: Lors du déménagement d'un immeuble voué à être détruit, Andy et Chloe découvrent un homme torturé dans un appartement vide, et dévoilent une opération criminelle de grande envergure.

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Duncan reprend du service et souhaite se réconcilier avec Andy, qui n'est pas prête. Mais quand une bombe explose dans le centre-ville, la 15e Division doit en arrêter l'auteur au plus vite.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: La 15e Division s'efforce de retrouver Ted Mcdonald, l'auteur de l'attentat à la voiture piégée. Une fois attrapé, ils réalisent qu'il a dispersé d'autres bombes dans la nature.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Un mois après l'attentat à la bombe, Andy et Sam reprennent le travail. Mais quand Andy est agressée, la brigade des mœurs entre en conflit avec la 15e Division sur la manière de procéder.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Namaste England
programme.desc: Param is besotted with Jasmeet when he watches her dance during a Dussehra celebration. An ambitious Jasmeet wishes to be a jewellery designer, but her father and brother discourage her. They even agree to wed her off to Param, who doesn't want her to work after marriage. Once they get married, Jasmeet tries to coax Param to get UK citizenship even if it means resorting to illegal means. But Param is a man of principles and rejects her ideas. Unknown to him, Jasmeet comes up with a risky plan to fulfill her ambitions.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Gharwali Pedwali
programme.desc: Jeetu's dream of a simple life shatters when he ends up with two wives - one quirky and one ghostly. With four parents, two bosses and two wives, chaos is his only constant.

programme.title: Gharwali Pedwali
programme.desc: Jeetu's dream of a simple life shatters when he ends up with two wives - one quirky and one ghostly. With four parents, two bosses and two wives, chaos is his only constant.

programme.title: Begusarai
programme.desc: Begusarai is the story of Phulan Thakur and his family and how they rule the land of Begusarai. The land where respect, money and power are earned through bloodshed. And it is also the story of a simple girl Poonam, and how all these violence and power-hungry men affect her life and her dreams.

programme.title: Begusarai
programme.desc: Begusarai is the story of Phulan Thakur and his family and how they rule the land of Begusarai. The land where respect, money and power are earned through bloodshed. And it is also the story of a simple girl Poonam, and how all these violence and power-hungry men affect her life and her dreams.

programme.title: Juzz Baatt
programme.desc: Juzz Baatt is a light-hearted celebrity chat show hosted by Rajeev Khandelwal. Celebrities are invited for a candid chat where they share interesting details about their life and career.

programme.title: RAMAIYA VASTAVAIYA
programme.desc: Ram, a city boy, falls for village girl Sona. After his mother insults her, Sona's brother Raghuveer challenges Ram to prove he's worthy of winning her heart.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.16
programme.desc: Gun provides wholehearted support for the collaboration, while Mi Young grows uncomfortable with his constant presence at her side. Se Ra becomes increasingly uneasy about Mi Young's return.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.17
programme.desc: Mi Young decides to leave Korea right away, but news that Gun has been alone for three years weighs on her mind. Daniel is thrown when he hears Gun has a hereditary illness, and Se Ra seeks out Mi Young again.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.18
programme.desc: Mi Young decides to stay by Gun's side and meets with Chairwoman Wang. Gun announces he will step down in three months, with the chairwoman filling in during his absence. Yong's mom hands Gun a mysterious diary.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.19
programme.desc: Chairwoman Wang is dumbfounded when Gun and Mi Young suddenly go missing. Mi Young's mother asks Gun to let Mi Young go, and he works hard to change her mind. Meanwhile, Se Ra becomes convinced the little girl in Daniel's photo is her.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.20
programme.desc: Gun and Mi Young spend blissful days together, while Chief Tak and Yong try to recreate the “Macau revival” plan.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.1
programme.desc: Hyun Soo is a 29-year-old who quit a promising and well-paying job to become a screenwriter. However, things don't turn out as she expected. Hyun Soo is living with her younger sister, Hyun Yi, who earns more than what Hyun Soo makes. One day, Hyun Soo meets Jung Sun in a runners' club.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.7
programme.desc: Hyeri goes to support the Media N Seoul sports day with snacks and ends up paired with Joo-yeon for dodgeball. She accidentally injures her hand during the event. A few days later, at a joint campaign shoot, Joo-yeon meets Eun-ho, who looks exactly like Hyeri.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.8
programme.desc: Right before a live broadcast, Eun-ho is shaken by rumors she hears about Hyun-oh. During the news, she makes a disastrous mistake and soon faces the threat of being pulled from all her programs.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.9
programme.desc: Eun-ho disappears without warning after saying she will use up all her saved leave days. Joo-yeon becomes frustrated as Hyeri never appears again no matter how long he waits.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.10
programme.desc: Hyun-oh finds Eun-ho in the forest where Hyeri once vanished and brings her back, but the Eun-ho he loved is nowhere to be seen. Is she Hyeri or Eun-ho.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.11
programme.desc: Eun-ho and Hyun-oh embrace each other's wounds and confirm their true feelings. Back at the station, Eun-ho begins to see the real Hyun-oh more clearly. After confronting her past trauma and confusion over her identity, she steps into a new everyday life.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.12
programme.desc: In the underground parking lot, Jae-yong is attacked in Hyun-oh's place and taken to the intensive care unit. The PPS evening main anchor seat becomes suddenly vacant.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.11
programme.desc: Seo Do Jae gets unexpected advice from his mother and later arranges a surprise getaway for Han Se Gye. Kang Sa Ra finds Ryu Eun Ho's actions baffling.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.12
programme.desc: Seo Do Jae calmly handles mounting questions about him, but fears the worst when Han Se Gye disappears. Sa Ra reassesses where her loyalties lie.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.13
programme.desc: Seo Do Jae and Han Se Gye grapple with what it truly means to be with someone, no matter the circumstances. Seo Do Jae makes a surprising revelation.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.14
programme.desc: As Seo Do Jae processes Han Se Gye's stunning confession, they wrestle with fate's implications, while a saboteur in the company tries to undermine him.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.15

programme.title: The Ascent of Civilization
programme.sub-title: How the Greeks Changed the World
programme.desc: Ancient Greece – the cradle of modern Europe. Around 3000 years ago, the cultural foundations of western civilisation were laid right here, on the shores of the Mediterranean. It's the birthplace of democracy, where great thinkers forged the beginnings of scientific reasoning, where theatre was turned into mass entertainment, and where the Olympic Games began. Imaginative animation, stunning visuals and an entertaining narrative combine in an extraordinary exploration of Greece and the rise of an ancient super-power that would leave a permanent mark on western society.

programme.title: The Ascent of Civilization
programme.sub-title: How the Romans Changed the World
programme.desc: The Romans created one of the greatest empires in history, built with the help of an incredible army of professional legionnaires and a well-oiled political machinery. At its height, a few hundred men ruled over a fifth of mankind and an area stretching from Britain to Syria and from Gibraltar to the Euphrates. They undertook some of the most ambitious building projects of their time: endless roads, gigantic bridges and imposing aqueducts formed a complex infrastructure and left a lasting legacy. This film is a revelatory and unique journey into the world of ancient Rome.

programme.title: The Ascent of Civilization
programme.sub-title: How the Vikings Changed the World
programme.desc: This episode explores the Vikings not as ruthless raiders but as groundbreaking seafarers, traders, and explorers. Master shipbuilders, they forged vast networks of commerce stretching from Europe to Asia and even reached the shores of America centuries before Columbus. By challenging the stereotype of violent marauders, the documentary presents the Vikings as a tolerant and skilled people whose innovations in navigation and trade reshaped medieval exploration and left an enduring mark on global history.

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Encounter: UFO
programme.desc: Flying a plane is said to be stretches of endless boredom punctuated by moments of sheer terror. But whoever coined the cliché was imagining mechanical issues and bad weather, not a frightening encounter with a UFO.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. Every eight seconds, someone, somewhere is seeing something highly unusual in the skies above our planet. But what happens when hundreds or even thousands of people witness the same UFO event?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in our skies touch down to Earth leaving physical evidence behind. Are these attempts to communicate? Scientific studies by extraterrestrials? The next inevitable step toward contact?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs. Objects that return to the skies overhead across the course of years and decades as if taunting the witnesses below.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Manatees on the Move
programme.desc: Manatees, sea cows, these gentle giants go by several names. They were once thought to be beautiful mermaids that could lure sailors to their deaths, though they probably won't win too many beauty contests. To retain their weight, manatees need to eat for 8 hours and consume 8% of their bodyweight every day. And keeping eating also means keeping moving! Thanks to their tolerance of human visitors, manatees have mates everywhere, working tirelessly to ensure they roam the world for generations to come.

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Hunters of the Forest
programme.desc: Forests are dark, shady habitats, realms of shadows perfect for predators to lurk. The dense plant growth facilitates a wealth of prey species, and cunning predators of all shapes and sizes have adapted to exploit every niche. Whether crawling on the forest floor, gliding through the trees or stalking the shadows in between, hunters have mastered the terrain in every type of forest imagina-ble. And they're not just stealthy, they're also some of the most enigmatic and beautiful creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Moose Movie
programme.desc: Nothing shouts northern wilderness more than a magnificent bull moose, the undisputed king of the forest. But moose don't start out big and burly for two twins born into a forest glade a challenging life lies ahead. They'll need to quickly learn the ways of the wilderness, how to find food and cope with predators. We'll watch the first episodes of their young lives as they find their place among their giant cousins. It's a story with enough drama to fill a Hollywood movie – a moose movie.

programme.title: Kanga Pan
programme.desc: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary. Who is the killer on the loose? Who is terrorising the pan? An investigation needs to be undertaken.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Dreams of the Settlers
programme.desc: The vast Delta of the Mississippi River is the gateway to the South of the United States. It always has been. This is where our journey begins: through Louisiana along the banks of the mighty river, to the big inland city of New Orleans, founded long ago by the French. Further inland, sugarcane plantations and the villas of their former owners stretch as far as the eye can see. To the north, we leave the river and, taking spectacular roads, we pass through the swamplands of the Mississippi, which were once impenetrable, serving as the ideal hideout for many a runaway. Bordering Texas, where the swamplands end, is the beginning of the vast cattle country. This is home to the last remaining cowboys in the United States who, still today, maintain their French cultural heritage.

programme.title: Dreams of the Settlers
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are among the most mythical landscapes of North America: endless water, endless forest. Many Native American peoples lived there later European settlers followed on the heels of the white hunters and trappers. They hunted in the forests and transported their furs and other goods across the water to the south where a small river situated at the southern tip of Lake Michigan flows onward towards the southern states. The settlement that sprung up there was called Checagou by the Indians. Much later, the settlement was to be the first skyscraper city in the world: Chicago, the megacity on the Great Lake.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E01
programme.desc: In the far west of India, unexpected predators roam: lions. Living freely in a human-inhabited area without fences, they occasionally prey on the livestock of the indigenous Maldhari people, who nevertheless take pride in sharing their region with these lions—a unique coexistence of humans and predators. In northern Gujarat, desert landscapes dominate, where semi-nomadic communities breed a unique camel breed capable of swimming: Karai camels swim up to 3km daily to mangrove islands for grazing.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E02
programme.desc: In Sabah, northern Borneo, flows the 560km-long Kinabatangan River. Nowhere else in Sabah are wild animals as easily spotted as along this river: orangutans, elephants, crocodiles, and proboscis monkeys. However, biodiversity is threatened as more rainforest gives way to palm oil plantations. Wildlife ventures into inhabited areas in search of food, leading to conflicts. Locals are fighting to preserve the rainforest and its unique wildlife, demonstrating that conservation and prosperity can coexist even in a modern society.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E03
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E04
programme.desc: The Great Gobi National Park in southwestern Mongolia shelters one of the last populations of wild Bactrian camels, amid its ancient and mysterious desert landscape. With around 800 critically endangered animals, the Gobi remains one of the world's most sparsely inhabited and inhospitable regions, yet its allure is undeniable, offering a captivating backdrop for encounters with wild camels and stories of people deeply connected to nature.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E05
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: The Secret world of Herbs
programme.desc: Its native fragrant flowers and aromatic herbs have made the Provence a brand known worldwide. The wealth of flora found in this region, between the French Alps and the Mediterranean, is unequalled among the French provinces. Around Sault, near Mont Ventoux, the valleys and high plains are carpeted with bright violet: In the hot climate of the South of France, lavender blooms and exudes its fragrance. Monastic healers have been using its aromatic medicinal oil since the Middle Ages. And today an entire industry is based on the trade with this fragrant flower. Yet the livelihood of Provençal lavender farmers is imperiled. In France's major lavender-growing region, the “Plateau de Valensole”, our viewers encounter Gérard Blanc, who has been hit particularly hard. The lavender farmer lost sixty percent of his harvest to one tiny insect: the leafhopper. This insect has already destroyed half of the lavender acreage, bumping France from its market position as the world's top producer of lavender oil. The film visits a resolute farmer who, not about to give up, is testing methods to fend off the voracious insect.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We've got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They're going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other's strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let's find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world's strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we'll find out.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.
